ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, WR) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player currently plays for */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "player_position_detail" TEXT /* Detailed position (e.g., WR1, WR2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passing_stats" (
  "pass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passing stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards */,
  "passing_td" INTEGER /* Total passing touchdowns */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions thrown */,
  "passing_att" INTEGER /* Total passing attempts */,
  "completion_rate" REAL /* Completion rate (calculated as Cmp / PassingAtt) */,
  "passing_completions" INTEGER /* Total passing completions */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks taken */,
  "sack_yards_lost" INTEGER /* Yards lost due to sacks */,
  "longest_pass" INTEGER /* Longest passing play */,
  "qbr" REAL /* Quarterback rating */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points from passing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passing_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rushing_stats" (
  "rush_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rushing stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "rushing_att" INTEGER /* Total rushing attempts */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "rushing_long" INTEGER /* Longest rushing play */,
  "rushing_tds" INTEGER /* Total rushing touchdowns */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points from rushing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rush_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receiving_stats" (
  "receive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receiving stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Total receptions made */,
  "targets" INTEGER /* Total targets received */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards */,
  "receiving_long" INTEGER /* Longest receiving play */,
  "receiving_tds" INTEGER /* Total receiving touchdowns */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points from receiving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receiving_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_points" (
  "points_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy points entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "ppr_fantasy_points" REAL /* Total PPR fantasy points */,
  "standard_fantasy_points" REAL /* Total Standard fantasy points */,
  "half_ppr_fantasy_points" REAL /* Total Half-PPR fantasy points */,
  "total_fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points (sum of PPR, Standard, Half-PPR) */,
  "fantasy_points_per_game" REAL /* Average fantasy points per game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the points are for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("points_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "max_teams" INTEGER /* Maximum number of teams allowed in the league */,
  "scoring_type" TEXT /* Type of scoring system used (e.g., PPR, Standard) */,
  "league_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "league_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "league_admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league administrator */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., public, private) */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the team */,
  "team_roster" TEXT /* Roster of players (JSON array or foreign key to a separate roster table) */,
  "team_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget for the team */,
  "team_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "team_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "team_ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "team_points" REAL /* Total points scored by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team involved in the transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., draft, trade, drop) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "source_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team from which the player is being moved */,
  "destination_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the player is being moved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, player) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "team_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., manager, owner, co-manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft entry */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the draft is part of */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being picked */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "draft_date" TEXT /* Date of the draft */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position in the draft round */,
  "draft_status" TEXT /* Status of the draft (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "draft_type" TEXT /* Type of draft (e.g., snake, auction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of injury */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., out, day-to-day) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "injury_update" TEXT /* Latest update on the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards in the game */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards in the game */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards in the game */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points scored in the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "game_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "game_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the game */,
  "game_fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "game_fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
